About Sanni

Your Coach.
Your Results.

Sanni is a dedicated personal trainer who empowers individuals to take charge of their health and fitness journey. His approach combines discipline, motivation, and expertise â€” creating an environment where clients push their limits and achieve real transformation.

Specialising in rehabilitation-focused coaching, boxing fitness, and performance training, Sanni works with clients across all fitness levels â€” from beginners to GP-referred patients.

Specialist Areas

Where Expertise
Makes The Difference

Pain-Aware Movement & Performance

Coaching that works with your body, not against it. Structured movement for clients with chronic pain or limitations.

Lower Back Rehab Support

Evidence-informed protocols to rebuild strength and mobility after lower back pain â€” safely and progressively.

GP Referral Exercise Training

Working alongside medical professionals for clients referred for exercise as part of their health management plan.

Advanced Boxercise Coaching

High-intensity boxing fitness sessions to build cardio, coordination, strength, and lasting confidence.
